scope: Held-out synthetic renderer/template evaluation with OCR geometry perturbation; not a real-document benchmark.

known_limitations: All data are generated by one codebase and share labels, text grammar, fonts, and non-geometric capture transformations.
Perfect F1 is a controlled pipeline/robustness result, not a production-accuracy or calibration claim.

next_gate: Acquire governed external or consented evaluation data, add independent annotation review, and assess OCR text corruption, geometric transforms, language/script variation, calibration, and field-level exact match before closing Phase 4.
